nodes.name: cursor_multi_conn.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test verifying cursor behavior across multiple concurrent connections in batch transaction mode.

nodes.name: cursor.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for cursor-based result iteration in batch transactions including fetch, move, and close semantics.

nodes.name: now.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for NOW() function consistency within batch transactions.

nodes.name: read_only.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for read-only transaction semantics and isolation level enforcement.

nodes.name: same_session.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for transaction visibility within the same session.

nodes.name: tolerance.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for transaction error tolerance and rollback behavior.
